title: Hey Cameron — crypto follow-up + 'banana in Mario Kart' drugs thesis
html:
Hey Cameron — crypto follow-up + 'banana in Mario Kart' drugs thesis

Source: 2021-12-05 Apple Note. Three-line junk-drawer: a follow-up DM draft to "Cameron" met "last night talking about crypto," a one-line "molding sandwich" repulsion analogy, and a drugs-as-banana-in-Mario-Kart thesis ("a minor distraction, that done little, may not matter in the long term. But continuous minor distractions adds up to major blunders").

TL;DR

  • Drafts a low-pressure crypto-network follow-up to Cameron (likely Cameron Lewis — Yahir's recurring 2019 Grants Pass hustle partner; if a different Cameron, queued for disambiguation).
  • Coins the drugs-as-Mario-Kart-banana analogy — drugs aren't a one-shot disaster, they're a recurring minor distraction whose damage compounds. First crisp version of Yahir's drugs thesis.
  • Captures "thesis on drugs" as an explicit to-write item — Yahir naming it as a project, not just a passing thought.
  • Tucks in a molding-sandwich aesthetic note: "a great analogy for something repulsive" — Yahir collecting metaphor-primitives the way other people collect quotes.
  • Sits at the crypto club era — Dec 2021 was peak Yahir-evangelizing-crypto, three months into OSU freshman year.

Pattern observed

The note is a microcosm of Yahir's three favorite Apple-Notes uses simultaneously: (1) DM follow-up draft, (2) collected analogy / aesthetic primitive, (3) named-thesis placeholder. Compare the parallel-track structure of 2020 03 30 facebook and 2020 11 15 scholarship essays. The drugs-thesis articulation here predates the more developed 2021 11 05 "you don't know what you have become until you have become it" by exactly one month — same month-long arc.

Open questions

  • Confirm: is "Cameron" here the same as Cameron Lewis from 2019, or a separate crypto-meetup Cameron?
  • Did the drugs-thesis ever get written long-form?

Related

  • cameron lewis
  • corvallis crypto club
  • osu
